action.reasoning: Observation: success_rate improved to 0.015 with successes in sit_simple (0.1) and push (0.05); mean rewards increasing but still below bars (e.g. sit~440<750, reach~2400<12000). Training with 1M steps/task worked after fixing multiprocessing guard. Analysis: Continuing training from saved checkpoints with additional steps will accumulate experience without restarting; focusing compute with 500k more steps/task fits time budget (~2.3h); larger network, lower LR for better convergence on hard humanoid tasks. VecNormalize continuation will maintain obs stats. Decision: Update train.py to load previous models/vecnorms and continue learning, adjust hparams, run training then submit_eval for updated score.
